category.scope_note: Filtering facepiece respirator (FFP mask) compliance comparison: China domestic (GB 2626 KN95) to Armenia market (EAEU TR CU 019/2011, EAC certification).

title.en: China-to-Armenia PPE Respirator (FFP Mask) Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国口罩呼吸器进入亚美尼亚（EAEU）：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國口罩呼吸器進入亞美尼亞（EAEU）：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of Chinese PPE respirator (KN95 / GB 2626) documentation against Armenia/EAEU requirements under TR CU 019/2011 (PPE safety), mandatory EAC certification via accredited EAEU conformity assessment body, EAC marking, Russian/Armenian-language labelling, and applicable GOST EN 149-type harmonised standards. TR EAEU 037/2016 (RoHS-style) applies to electrical PPE components.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件与亚美尼亚/EAEU要求对照，涵盖TR CU 019/2011（PPE安全）、通过认可EAEU合格评定机构的强制EAC认证、EAC标志、俄语/亚美尼亚语标签，以及适用的GOST EN 149型协调标准。TR EAEU 037/2016（类RoHS）适用于电气PPE组件。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國PPE呼吸器（KN95/GB 2626）文件與亞美尼亞/EAEU要求對照，涵蓋TR CU 019/2011（PPE安全）、通過認可EAEU合格評定機構的強制EAC認證、EAC標誌、俄語/亞美尼亞語標籤，以及適用的GOST EN 149型協調標準。TR EAEU 037/2016（類RoHS）適用於電氣PPE組件。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, accredited-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current EAEU technical regulations, applicable GOST harmonised standards, accredited EAC certification body scope, and Armenian market surveillance practice with qualified regulatory professionals before shipment or placing products on the market.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、认可机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商及分销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格的法规专业人士核验现行EAEU技术法规、适用的GOST协调标准、认可EAC认证机构范围及亚美尼亚市场监督实践。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、認可機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商及分銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格的法規專業人士核驗現行EAEU技術法規、適用的GOST協調標準、認可EAC認證機構範圍及亞美尼亞市場監督實踐。

answer_first.en: FFP respirators exported from China to Armenia (an EAEU full member) must comply with TR CU 019/2011 (On the safety of personal protective equipment) and obtain mandatory EAC certification — PPE is a certification (not declaration) category under EAEU rules. Products must carry the EAC mark and labelling in Russian and/or the national language (Armenian). Chinese GB 2626 (KN95) test reports do not substitute for GOST EN 149-type conformity testing required under TR CU 019/2011. Electrical PPE components are additionally subject to TR EAEU 037/2016 (RoHS-style restrictions).
answer_first.zh: 从中国出口至亚美尼亚（EAEU正式成员国）的FFP呼吸器须符合TR CU 019/2011（个人防护装备安全）并取得强制EAC认证——在EAEU规则下，PPE属认证（而非申报）类别。产品须加贴EAC标志并以俄语和/或国家语言（亚美尼亚语）标注。中国GB 2626（KN95）检测报告不能替代TR CU 019/2011要求的GOST EN 149型合规测试。电气PPE组件还须额外符合TR EAEU 037/2016（类RoHS限制）。
answer_first.zht: 從中國出口至亞美尼亞（EAEU正式成員國）的FFP呼吸器須符合TR CU 019/2011（個人防護裝備安全）並取得強制EAC認證——在EAEU規則下，PPE屬認證（而非申報）類別。產品須加貼EAC標誌並以俄語和/或國家語言（亞美尼亞語）標注。中國GB 2626（KN95）檢測報告不能替代TR CU 019/2011要求的GOST EN 149型合規測試。電氣PPE組件還須額外符合TR EAEU 037/2016（類RoHS限制）。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: annual or on material regulatory change
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be set to true.
